title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · Boundary Failure Triage
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evi…
objectives: Choose bundler or NodeNext resolution and trace file, extension, package exports, and type lookup decisions.
Distinguish type-only and value imports and preserve runtime side effects intentionally.
Align package exports, imports, type, declaration paths, runtime format, and supported environments.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
